textByHash.0332c0b69f93be9529cde2d520ad5e1be98dfc22: Lost? This is no more than a minor setback. The work we have done here will see the end of your kind. You are too late to stop it.
textByHash.388235e4d89840f6f45e23297dee0f4e387575ba: Our new weapon. One that will bring a swift end to humanity. I'd love to be able to show you, but I'm afraid I have more pressing matters.
textByHash.4c3043f955790f943cd8e11288309414edd2b87a: Robert! I should have known that this would be your doing.
textByHash.956c669f73ac378242c6c0c63a7c5846537daf32: Yes we will, for this is where it begins.
textByHash.ce77a0fff0268b7e46d64027d188c9314ee32e9a: You'd like that, wouldn't you? Alas, I'm afraid that I won't be the one that dies today.
